coverage.criterion: Daily forecast shows tomorrow, next week, and month-end projected balance per account
coverage.notes: Engine milestone derivation (T-0015); daily API with milestones (T-0018); ECharts stat cards + line chart per account (T-0020); unit/integration tests (T-0023)

coverage.criterion: Monthly forecast shows income, fixed costs, variable costs, and free cashflow
coverage.notes: Category buckets and monthly decomposition (T-0015); monthly API series (T-0018); four-bucket bar chart (T-0020); projection unit tests (T-0023)

coverage.criterion: Long-term forecasts available for 3, 6, 12, and 24 months
coverage.notes: 730-day projection with 3/6/12/24 month end balances (T-0015); long-term API with horizon param (T-0018); horizon pills 3/6/12/24 (T-0020); API contract tests (T-0023)

coverage.criterion: Forecast data persisted in TimescaleDB hypertables
coverage.notes: Migration 002 hypertables (T-0013); repository read/write (T-0014); ForecastService persist + retention (T-0016); integration test recompute → hypertable → API (T-0023)

coverage.criterion: React UI displays forecast charts (ECharts) for selected account and horizon
coverage.notes: Forecast page shell, account selector, Daily|Monthly|Long-term tabs (T-0019); ECharts views per tab and horizon (T-0020); operator guide for /forecast UI (T-0024)

coverage.criterion: Grafana Dashboard 1 (Cashflow: balance, forecast, scarcity markers) provisioned
coverage.notes: cashflow.json with balance + forecast overlay panels, static €200 scarcity threshold line, FlowFinancePostgreSQL uid (T-0021)
forecast-horizons.json with 1/3/6/12/24 month horizon panels, latest computation_id filter (T-0022)

coverage.criterion: Forecasts recompute after Firefly sync completes
coverage.notes: ForecastService.recompute + retention (T-0016); sync hook after successful ingest, mutex covers recompute (T-0017); repository supports computation lifecycle (T-0014); sync hook test (T-0023); user guide + optional Sync Status sub-state (T-0024)
